review_text:
The rooms are immaculate. We were front row position in front of the pool, close to the bar and front desk. Clean, everything that you need including a stove, Microwave and BBQ.

Friendly service and nothing too much trouble for staff. Great centralised location.

Food was delicious 😋 both from the bar and the Cafe on-site.

HIGHLY RECOMMEND
What a fantastic holiday spot it has everything you could ask for and so much to do for kids you would never have to leave the park

Marion Holiday Park has been on my list for a family staycay for a while. And lets just say, it didn't disappoint. Only 30 minutes from home but felt like we were miles away, in some sort of tropical oasis. We stayed in a deluxe poolside apartment. Ultra modern, light, spacious and had everything you need. Overlooks pool, water park and is centrally located to outdoor cinema (loved this and the burgers...yum) and games room. Activities to suit whether the sun's shining or it's raining and for kids of various ages. We'll definitely be back!

The best park for kids
Outdoor cinema and movies for the kids with a great tuck shop that sells food and alchohol ,heated pool and outdoor pool,kids waterpark ,kids huge playground and inflatable bouncing mound,
Ten pin bowling and so much more for the kids to do to mention
Very easy access to wherever u need to go in Adelaide
Enjoy yr visit we certainly did
Fantastic place to stay. The staff were lovely, the cabin was clean, well maintained and a good size. The facilities were really great, especially the waterpark and heated indoor pool.

The Marion Holiday Park has just the best facilities and such friendly helpful staff.  I cannot speak highly enough about this park - our family had such a wonderful time and we will definitely be rebooking again soon.
Dianne
Very nice place with palm trees like the Bahamas just the studios showers are a bit low for a tall person

A fantastic park with great facilities. The rooms are modern, clean and perfect for a medium sized family. The kids have a blast on all the activities, with some highlights being the bowling, indoor and outdoor pools, tennis court and jumping pillow. We keep coming back, it’s that good.

Stayed here during Gather Round.  Excellent location, a short walk to the train station and a 5min drive to the shops. We stayed in a 2 bedroom Lodge. Accommodation was clean and modern with enough space for a family of 4 (2 adults 2 teens).  Facilities are great, the kids absolutely loved the pool. The cafe on site was a bonus. We had dinner there a couple of nights, food was really good and very reasonably priced. Would definitely recommend this holiday park for families.

We stayed at Marion for 3 1/2 weeks and cannot fault the facilities, location and staff.
Big shout out to Louise and Spiro at the Palms Bar for their friendly service. Always a smile and warm greeting. Made our stay a real pleasure every day. Best food and cocktails. We enjoyed them so much we had to buy a slushie machine when we got home to Darwin to try to make them.
Highly recommend staying there. Great also for locals to have a weekend break away from home. Lots for kids to do.
The grounds were always kept well maintained and the cleaning staff were so friendly. Reception were also helpful by helping my partner when he had his breakfast of Champions each morning.
We will be back next time we are in beautiful Adelaide.
Well worth it.
Thank you all for being amazing.
Kindest regards
Adrian and Rachel (C3)

This was our second stay at Marion Holiday Park, and unfortunately this visit didn’t quite match the positive experience we had the first time.

We first stayed in a two-bedroom bungalow and had a fantastic time with little to no issues, which is why we were happy to return for Gather Round. Adelaide was understandably very busy, but the park itself actually felt quite calm and wasn’t overcrowded, which we really appreciated.

This time we stayed in a three-bedroom bungalow, and there’s still so much to love about this place. It’s a beautiful setting, with wildlife coming right up to the door, and having a morning coffee on the verandah is genuinely lovely. It still has that peaceful holiday feel that made us come back in the first place.

That said, there were a few maintenance issues during this stay that took the shine off. The shower leaked into the hallway whenever someone used it, we had a huge storm and one of the outdoor light covers blew off, and both the dishwasher and oven stopped working. While things can obviously go wrong, we did raise these issues with reception and were told someone would come out to repair them, but unfortunately that never happened.

We also noticed something a bit strange with a large cluster of flies constantly gathering in one corner of the bungalow, which felt unusual and a little unpleasant.

The biggest issue for us, though, was a break-in to our car. The driveway sits right beside the main bedroom window, and unfortunately outsiders entered the park sometime after security had completed their rounds. To be fair, my car was locked, but due to a key fault one door hadn’t locked properly. I don’t place this entirely on the park, and it’s more something for future guests to be mindful of — definitely be extra cautious with valuables.

What left a disappointing final impression was when we mentioned the incident while returning our fobs a day early and said we likely wouldn’t return next year, the response from reception was essentially that theft was “expected.” That lack of concern was probably the most disappointing part of the whole stay.

Overall, it’s still a lovely park in a fantastic location, and we do have fond memories from our first stay, but this second visit was mixed enough that we’d need to seriously consider whether we’d return.
Perfect!!

We have stayed at Marion Holiday Park for four years running and have rebooked for our fifth. It is absolutely brilliant for the kids - so much to keep them entertained. Our poolside apartment is always comfy, clean, and well-appointed. Perfect accommodation for our annual Gather Round trip.
Very modern, comfortable and clean accommodation. Great facilities and location. Highly recommend this park.
Great caravan park in a lovely location. Very helpful staff who couldn’t do enough when we broke down.
Amazing park with fantastic accommodation options, so many facilities for everyone and lovely staff!
Great park, awesome location. Staff were awesome, happy to help. Bathrooms and amenities clean. Cant wait to return!
Awesome  place love it

We hired a powered site over the long weekend and absolutely loved our stay! The amenities are well maintained and our children had the best time. It's well looked after, super lush and green, making it feel like an oasis! Safe to say we'll be back!

Stayed for two nights got a caravan site next to the playground perfect for our children facilities where fantastic but having people in a caravan smoking weed within 10m of a playground is not on I approached the couple and then was abused by them so we reported to staff who said they will sort it out three hours later nothing happened still smoking so went back to reception and they said nothing they can do so we had two days passive smoking and so would all the children on the playground also getting the finger from one of them when we walked outside
We all had a wonderful time at Marion holiday park, kids were entertained and looking for bed at the end of the day. Will definitely be back

I enjoyed our two nights there, the tropical gardens made it seem that we were away from home, peaceful even though we were still in the city. Family friendly, the accommodation near the pool side was the highlight of our stay. The children loved the arcade also. The accommodation where  spacious,plenty of room, comfortable bed. We didn't check the other facilities, or activities out as we were only there for the pool and aircon.
A++. 😊 Yes we will be back ⭐

Great stay once again.
Accomodation upgrade was very much appreciated. My kids had a great time in the pool..  food was delicious!
This was a great home base for our cricket team. The facilities on site were exceptional and the location put us in the heart of the tournament location.

Had a family reunion, was great for our families to stay close and made it easier for SA family to see us or take us around. Facilities in park so good especially if you have kids. Staff so nice and helpful.
There is no time limit for guest to party to all our of the night, so other paying guest have to put up 🤨with no though for others

Unsafe, uninhabitable accommodation – refusal to refund. No resolution just a fob off like thier below response.
We booked and paid for accommodation at BIG4 in good faith. Upon arrival, the cabin was not fit for occupation, particularly given extreme heat and the presence of two young children.
The air-conditioning was not operating to a level that made the cabin habitable, and there was no visible evidence of current electrical test and tagging on appliances. These issues were raised immediately with management. After consultation, it was clear the issues could not be rectified within a reasonable timeframe.
Given the conditions, we had no practical or safe alternative but to leave and secure alternative accommodation at short notice and additional cost.
Despite this, management refused a refund. The written response we received from the Holiday Park Manager stated:
“There will be no refund for your cabin as the cabin was checked on your departure day with everything working fine in there. Have a nice day.”
This response is dismissive, inconsistent with our lived experience, and fails to acknowledge basic consumer and safety obligations. Under Australian Consumer Law, accommodation must be of acceptable quality and reasonably fit for purpose. A failure of essential services in extreme heat constitutes a major failure, entitling a consumer to a refund.
We are now escalating this matter to Consumer and Business Services (SA) and SafeWork SA for review of both consumer compliance and safety standards.
This was a deeply disappointing experience, not just because of the condition of the accommodation, but because of the unprofessional and legally flawed response from management when the issue was raised.
Until this is addressed appropriately, we cannot recommend staying here.

Wonderful venue for family holiday.  We stayed in a poolside apartment, the accommodation was excellent, clean and modern, well stocked and very well designed. Although we stayed in peak summer holiday time where it was understandably busy with lots of people (big and small) everything just flowed nicely. The very pleasant staff have everything down to a T. Our two grandsons enjoyed the 2 lovely swimming pools,  amazing water play park, a bowling session, pickleball and pool.  The films shown in the lovely outdoor venue, where food and drinks were available, were aimed more at younger children, which is fine but our guys at 9 and 13 years may have preferred different film choices, maybe broader appeal classics such as Back to the Future, Lion King, Bambi. Minor issue really, as they were well worn out by dinner time and ready to chill in our comfortable apartment! Good job Marion Holiday Park. We are indeed blessed to have this conveniently located oasis.

This place has great accommodation but its the facilities that are a stand out. I stayed 2 nights and was looking after a 3 year old grandchild. We had the best day swimming in both the large and heated pools. The water slides were his favorite. If we werent already busy that night we would have also enjoyed the kids outdoor cinema.
But its not all about the kids. A lovely bar and cafe offering simple choices of beverages and food meant there was no need to head elsewhere. And the gardens and mature trees made you feel you were well away from the city!
Marion shopping centre and Event Cinemas are only 5 minutes away. and the beach not that far either.
We will definitely be back. A great place for a multi generational family break or even larger family reunion. Or for those that live in the city and dont want to drive to far with kids in the car!
Great family fun, lovely staff, good location!

Such a wonderful & peaceful place to stay!  & especially great for families with children. Close to beaches & not too far from the centre of Adelaide & the Adelaide Hills & wine regions. This was our fourth stay & we will return again next year.  Plenty of activities at this holiday park to keep the kids busy, including a great pool.  We especially love the bungalows and retreats  facing the creek and the views across to the Warriparinga Wetlands Reserve.  A wonderful place for a relaxing walk, as well as listening to the variety of native birds

We had a great time here, stayed 5 nights, enjoyed all the facilities, food is great and everything is so convenient, great location, clean room on arrival. Kids had a ball, unfortunately we didn’t get to use the bowling make sure you book early or you’ll miss out.
We had very friendly ducks at our door every morning, huge highlight for the kids, mama duck even brought her babies over to show us.
We can’t wait to come back next year, this will definitely be our yearly tradition

We loved every minute of our time at Marion Holiday Park!
The kids had a blast and made friends with other kids!
Indoor pool was great for the evening and the outdoor pool was great for the hot days.
Staff are super friendly and helpful!
We will be back!

Had a great time. Stayed at the camp site. Great undercover pool and activities for kids. I have rated it as luxury. When you have a powered site with water you know you have made it when it comes to having an affordable holiday.

We loved our stay!! So many facilities and had a wonderful time. The location near the hospital caused a lot of noise at night unfortunately when camping. Camp kitchen was immaculate and so were the shower and toilet facilities. Friendly staff, we will be back but perhaps to stay in a cabin in future.
Rooms were pretty good. The swimming pool, games room, playground and outdoor movie theatre was what elevated it to a 5 star though.

We spent two nights here in a retreat room. It was amazing. Staff were lovely. The retreat was amazing. Looked out over the creek and super modern. Came with Its own bbq on the patio. The two pools and water slides were great. Games room with basketball/tennis court is huge. I would go here again.

We’ve been coming here for over 6 yrs with our family and friends stayed in the 2 story apartments over the pool studios and the out back cabin enjoy them all we’ve even camped here that’s how much we enjoy location and park facilities

I tried to book a campsite, but the male staff member was extremely unprofessional. He sighed loudly, got frustrated, and even hung up because he couldn’t understand my English. Are non-native speakers not welcome at this campsite? This behavior is completely unacceptable for anyone working in customer service. Everyone deserves polite and patient treatment, regardless of accent or background. I felt disrespected and discriminated against. It is shocking that such a large chain operates with this kind of service mindset.

An amazing resort style holiday park. A great range of accommodation to suit all budgets. The poolside Lagoon units are AMAZING.   What would make it perfect would be a handrail to ascend the narrow steps, particularly for  parents carrying young children or the elderly.

Family from Adelaide, Hobart and Sydney descended on the Park for a week between 23rd and 30th December. Rooms were clean and comfy, caravan sites good as well. Facilities good. Great pool, bar and outdoor movie and eating area. BBQs clean, games room great. Staff friendly and helpful and everyone quiet after 10pm! A bit pricier than we were expecting but well worth the money with all the free stuff on offer including daily morning activities for the kids during the Christmas period. ||A few minor issues that I will report direct, but no deal breakers. Will certainly recommend and stay here again.
Very good stay at Marion Holiday park.
Great location, great facilities, great service. Would happily stay there in the future.

Absolute amazing place to go, been there so many times with family and friends, stayed in the creekside cabins. Amazing cabins, pools, food and service!! Going back there again for Australia day! Definitely recommend this place to stay

Great place for a luxury holiday. All rooms are great . The poolside are very luxurious . There is something for all ages Kids love the pool and playground and creek. Adults love the creek and birdlife, the beautiful gardens and the pool.So much to enjoy .

Fantastic Holiday Park. Very nice facilities with very friendly and helpfull staff members. I was escorted to my site by one of the staff members and he assisted me to park the caravan. Under roof warm water pool for the younger ones and lots to do for teenagers.
We really enjoyed our stay and will return.
Cons:
The odd emergency siren passing the Park is quite load.
We live coming here feels like a resort.
I loved Marion so much and wish to go again!

Love the park like atmosphere, the trees and gardens are beautifully maintained . The staff are lovely, friendly and courteous.
The apartment and linen was nice and clean.
Had a terrible experience here. Told them they didnt seem to care. They then asked me to email them about it and they didnt respond. Facilities are great but if you have a problem you're on your own.

Marion Holiday Park amazing if live around the corner or thousands of kilometres away.
You really need to visit and stay.
The accommodation is brilliant the staff are great.
The Palms bar area is awesome.
The food and service is exceptional.
Try it I dare you you won't be disappointed.
This is much more than your average caravan park.!!!

The Marion Holiday Park is an excellent choice whilst visiting Adelaide. Marion Park is situated close to the beach, cbd, cinema, shopping & easy public transport access. It is also close to all commercial needs by 30-40 minutes. Park facilities extend to evening childrens movies with availability to purchase meals & open bar, great swimming pool & water park, cafe including sale of selected items for your room or caravan and amazing Team to assist with any request or local knowledge. There is also an amazing natural park with open grassed playing areas, trees 500+ years old & space for kids to run freely neighbouring these grounds. I look forward to staying here again on my next visit to Adelaide.
Wonderful stay, thanks Marion Park Team.

I had the best customer service from all of the staff and thoroughly enjoyed the accommodation and facilities. The food we had for tea was great and the kids enjoyed watching the outdoor movie at the same time. 8am-9pm for the pool was very handy too!

Absolutely amazing!
One of the most beautiful staff members Louise is the kindest & most helpful person I’ve met :)
We came here from Newcastle & I will definitely be coming back!
A massive thankyou to Louise for everything!

This is our 4th family holiday at Marion. We love it here because it is compact. Everything is easy to get to and as our kids get older they can go from one family site to another without too much worry for the adults. Plenty to do. Clean. Caravan sites to lagoon apartments all fabulous. Staff are always friendly and helpful.
Fantastic facilities and staff. I look forward to going back there.

We recently stayed at Marion Holiday Park Adelaide and had a very mixed experience.

On the positive side, the rooms were spacious and the air-conditioning kept things comfortable. My wife booked a Deluxe Poolside Apartment, and the overall layout was great. Reception service was excellent — the gentleman and lady at the front desk were warm, helpful, and made us feel genuinely welcome. The kids absolutely loved the amenities like the mini-bowling, arcade games and movie area.

Unfortunately, a few issues significantly affected our stay. The bedding and pillows in my room had a noticeable urine smell, as though they hadn’t been cleaned or aired properly. For a premium room, this was disappointing.

The biggest concern, however, was the service at the food and movie area. Both times we ordered, the staff member serving at the counter made me feel unwelcome. When I politely asked about the size of the 10-inch pizza, she just pointed at the menu without looking at me and only spoke to my wife. My wife is Caucasian and I’m Fiji-Indian, and when the same behaviour happened again — and was noticed by my brother-in-law without me saying anything — it left me feeling incredibly uncomfortable.

A second incident confirmed this feeling. I waited patiently to ask if my daughter’s unopened apple juice could be swapped for orange juice. As soon as my brother-in-law finished paying, I asked — only to be snapped at with, “Mate, wait, I’m serving them.” They had already finished. She then swapped the juice without a word or even looking at me. My brother-in-law later commented unprompted that the staff member “really didn’t like you,” which was embarrassing and upsetting. As far as I could see, I was the only person of colour at the park, and the whole experience left me feeling excluded.

Overall, while the facilities and reception staff were fantastic, the housekeeping issues and the treatment I experienced at the food area were unacceptable. After this stay, I’ve made the decision to avoid caravan parks where the environment doesn’t feel open-minded or welcoming to everyone. It’s a shame, because Marion Holiday Park has so much potential — but this experience has put me off returning.
Best holiday park. Love the outdoor movie and the food was great. Nice swimming pool.

Overall I was super impressed with this place. It was probably one of the best holiday parks I’ve stayed at in relation to activities for kids. Between the splash park, lap pool, heated pool, playground, bowling, arcade and basketball and tennis court and nightly outdoor movies, there was always something to do. Our rooms were roomy, great pool access, and clean and tidy. The only minor issue that bothered me personally, but may not bother everyone was; the smoking in the courtyard of the lower level poolside rooms. Given that they were pool side I found the constant smell from the room below us disgusting. Between the smell on our balcony and the smell while in the pool area, it was my only negative. Maybe a designated smoking space away from the buildings and public areas would be better.

Great service very helpful as we were in Flinders hospital with baby not well. Rooms are nice and comfy food is amazing and it feels like an oasis does not feel like ur in the city highly recommended for family's or just a couple 10/10

We had a great stay! So many fun activities for children to do — our son loved the playground and games room, and the indoor pool was perfect for the cold weather. The cabin was a good size, really clean and beautifully designed. The reception staff were helpful and very welcoming.

Only a couple of small downsides: the cabin car space had lots of plants so it was a bit tricky to park a bigger car and get out. We also had a safety concern with the front door of the cabin- it couldn’t be locked from the inside which was a bit worrying with a toddler (we had to make a little barrier overnight).

Overall though, a lovely spot for a family getaway
10 out of 10

Highly recommend for families! We will be back!

We stayed at Marion Holiday Park (Cabin 61) for a Camp Quality Family Camp and it was amazing. The cabin was spotless, modern, and perfectly set up for a family of four. It had a cleverly designed full kitchen built into the hallway with everything you could need including a full-sized fridge, half oven and stove, half dishwasher drawer, microwave, coffee pod machine, toaster, and kettle, plus a BBQ outside. The large dining table easily seated six to eight people, and the lounge area was comfortable with a three-seater couch and an armchair.

The bedrooms were a great size with plenty of storage. The beds were very comfortable, and each bed had two pillows per person - a small thing that made a big difference after busy days. Sound proofing was also excellent, with the windows open we could hear the ambulance and police car sirens quite loudly (understandably as they stations are next door) once closed however, we could not hear them. Towels and toiletries were provided, with a daily refresh service that was a lovely touch. Our cabin opened straight onto the large pool area, which was fantastic. One section is indoors and heated, perfect when a storm rolled in. The pool is very long and never felt over crowded.

We loved the Halloween decorations and trick-or-treating, the great food and drinks by the pool bar, and the nightly movies were a hit with the kids. The wristband entry system is brilliant and made getting around so easy.

The staff and management were incredibly generous in supporting Camp Quality and the families attending.  It was such a beautiful, memorable experience.

Easily one of the best family holiday parks we’ve stayed at. Clean, comfortable, and so thoughtfully run. We’ll definitely be back!

Wonderful park.

Sets the bar for caravan parks by way of entertainment and leisure activities.

The slides were very entertaining.

A must for families travelling with a caravan through Adelaide.
Fantastic place with so many things to do on site, even for grandparents with their grandchildren 😄😍
Was here for a short stay. Cabin was clean and spacious. The staff friendly. Plenty to do. The food was delicious. Will definitely return for a longer stay.

I stayed in a cabin with my 3 children for 2 nights.
Everything was very nice and comfortable.

The lady English lady at reception was more than helpful .

And I thought the people her a very helpful and welcoming until I came across the lady in reception with the tight red curly hair.(sorry I didnt catch her name)
She was absolutely arrogant and rude.
Everything i approached her with i recieved an arrogant answer and like every customer that walked in annoyed her.
I also work in customer service and this is certainly how you will lose alot of customers  with her attitude.
We had a big group staying here and my sister also witnessed this red haired lady in reception being rude to another country worker infront of my sister.
I also came here last year with my children's grandparents and this same red headed lady was back then very rude and arrogant
And in top of that my brother who was also staying with his family also was at tge receiving end of a man working in reception who made it difficult for my brother to check in with his big 4 discount.
Goodness id love to come again but from not even half my stay here this particular lady in reception completely ruined my stay and I will not be back and I will also let everyone i come across know about this particular lady because I do not want anyone falling victim to what I witnessed.
Luckily my kids loved it here.
So thankyou beautiful English lady in reception who made my first part of our stay amazing

Facilities were ok and cabin we stayed in (Retreat) was very nice (albeit with some strange features) but 2 of the 3 staff that served us while we were here were not at all friendly or helpful.
I paid more for this caravan park than any other and the price did not reflect value for money at all. Will not be returning.
Only giving it 3 stars as there was good things for the kids to do.

It is with a heavy heart to rate this Park 3 stars. The Park itself is top notch with great amenities and facilities. There’s even a herb garden.
BUT WARNING!!!
Thieves are a plenty!!!
During our week stay we and others experienced theft. They come prepared with bolt cutters so lock your bikes in the Park’s shed. Such a shame 😞
It was a nuisance to change the locks on the caravan.
Great facilities and water slides and pools. the hotel was comfy clean and modern great for a getaway. PS once you go in you WONT wanna leave
Such a great place for a family holiday, clean well stocked units, so many activites for the kids. Set in a beautiful spot, you'll forget you are off a main road, we'll definitely be back.
Best holiday park I’ve ever been too! Cabins were modern and very clean, had so many things to do for the kids. Staff were friendly, food was amazing! We will be back! Thanks for the best stay
We loved Marion Holiday park the kids had a ball and the poolside balcony room was brilliant we will be back

Our first time staying here & we’ll be back. We stayed 3 nights at a powered sight with a group of friends and it was fantastic! The kids had so much fun. Lots to do, games room/bowling, big playground, water play indoor heated pool & they even had school holidays activities and free face painting + outdoor cinema. The facilities were clean and communal area was well kept. We only live 45 min away & this was a fantastic staycation! 🤩🙂

We have stayed at Marion Holiday Park many times and have only ever had amazing things to say about the place but yesterday was a whole other story. For a bit of background, we did change details of our booking a couple of times through email, which obviously caused some confusion on arrival resulting in miscommunication on number of nights. However, the person we were dealing with on Reception was the absolute height of rudeness! She had tight curly hair, I didn't catch her name. Her manner and tone of voice was disgusting. She wouldnt look me at me when speaking, staring at her screen, kept huffing and puffing and even swore under her breath at me at one point. She said "you're even 45 minutes early!" in a horrible tone. I asked her why she was speaking to me in that manner and she said "you are trying to agitate me" which couldn't have been further from the truth! I was so calm and polite trying to rectify the mix up with the booking only to be treated like crap! I eventually asked if her manager was around and she ignored my question but changed her tune and was all of a sudden nice as pie to us and checked us in! It was a very unsettling encounter! Only for our kids were so excited and we were meeting friends there I would have left straight away but we ended up leaving that evening and not staying! Will not be recommending to friends in future!
This is a fabulous park, you dont need to leave!  Our pool side apartment is gorgeous!!
How do they do it. Everything is perfect.
Great place to take the kids

Fantastic two night stay!
Everything was spot on!
Our accommodation was sparkling clean and lovely and spacious.
The facilities were outstanding, our grandchildren had a wonderful time exploring everything.
Thanks Marion Holiday Park, we will definitely be back soon!
Regards,
Kim
It’s amazing
Excellent, convenient location. Friendly and accommodating staff. Excellent facilities.
Family Friendly

Great holiday park for the Family, wish we could of stayed longer
Great location that makes you feel that your not in the suburbs with all the tropical plants and trees
Good food and lovely polite staff
Will definitely stay here again

Very nice rooms.
Staff very helpful and great to deal with for whatever your needs are.
Great location for country people having to go to Flinders. Walking distance to save on parking costs. Great facilities. Handy 5o have good food made on site. Surprisingly quiet at night.

The park is pure pleasure whether your staying in a cabin or in a caravan.
The resort style park has everything you need without leaving the property.
The staff are friendly and very welcoming, happy to help in any way.
The property and facilities are clean,  tidy and in excellent condition and in close proximity to the hospital and Marion Shopping Centre.
A great place to stay.
We were in a caravan and had a site right near amenities block. This holiday park has something for everyone and is next level caravan park accommodation.

If you want Family Friendly, this park was designed to cater for that need, plenty of activities to support the whole family from free Bowling, swimming pools, jumping pillow etc and as well you can enjoy the evening by a fire pit watching movies on the outdoor cinema screen.
Had a powered site, lovely grassed area with mat , everything was close and very kid friendly.
Kids had an absolute ball and the staff were very friendly and helpful

Marion Holiday Park would have to be the best place to stay when visiting Adelaide. The accommodation facilities are first rate. The facilities and staff are wonderful.  The park's location makes it a great base for visiting Adelaide and surrounds
Great location the staff are friendly and helpful,  we stay here often and are always welcomed back

Will never stay here again, rang to get the price of a cabin for two adults and two children, got a price and said I’ll ring back in 10 minutes as needed to confirm with other adult, rang back and said I had just rang and would like to book the cabin then I said I was informed that if your visit was because we’re going to flinders hospital there was a discount to which they replied yes it’s 15percent off but instead of taking 15 percent off she added 15 percent and when I got there to ask what was going on they said they didn’t do that but the first price was 15 percent less than when I rang back 10 minutes later, also had one person less staying in the room and they said they don’t charge any more or less for the amount of guests Absolutely disgusted with what they did to us, we had enough stress with the operation at flinders without being ripped off and lied to.

Had a lovely stay here, such a great little park. This park has everything from indoor/outdoor pools, water park, large games room, court, playground and jumping pillow. So much on offer for the kids. The nightly movies in the outdoor cinema were perfect for anytime with heating available. And the staff were great, so friendly and helpful. Such a great park.
Just remember to lock your car as its an open park and unfortunately this silly billy didn't check her car was locked on the last night.

Ripper location, close to the city but closer to nature. Jumping pillow, 2 pools, cinema, bar, arcade games, bowling.. what more could you ask for? Accomodation to suit every budget. Great communication from staff via text telling you what movie is showing and when to take the kids down. Marshmallow toasting on the fire at night time. 10/10. We stay every year but might have to make it twice a year. 🤫
Fantastic place to take children. Clean rooms with everything you could need. Great facilities and friendly helpful staff. Have been before and will continue to visit 😊

Booking and check-in were easy. Room was great. Staff were great. I asked for paper from the office and it wasn't a problem, Dinner was delicious and the staff doing the meals were great. Slices from the cafe were stale unfortunately - as the looked delicious. Highly recommend.
Lovely place, always a great stay. Will always recommend to friends especially those with kids

I went to Marion Holiday park yesterday, and I definitely enjoyed staying there. I've never been to a resort or hotel before, so this was going to be fun for me and my family. But, the problem is there is a pool with bugs and turd inside. My brother told me it got filtered every day, but I'm not sure to believe him or not. The TV upstairs is solar-powered, which was really strange. Since my family and I were the only black people there, going to places was awkward because he got many stares.
Such lush gardens, so much for the kids to do, even in cold wet winter. Can’t wait to visit again.

Beautiful getaway with our family this has been our 2nd time now, lovely atmosphere and felicitys,
Definitely be back again thats for sure 💯 ❤️
Great place for kids!!

A good sized caravan park with plenty of activities, has an indoor heated pool which is good for winter though the outside pool (nice and large) and splash park are a bit chilly in winter.
It has nightly movies during school holidays for kids which is good and an undercover jumping pillow so can be done in all weather types.

What an epic stay for families!
Good size sites, amazing facilities including playground, jump pillow, indoor and outdoor pool, outdoor cinema, games room, bowling. We had dinner at the palms bar and the food and service from the team there was also fantastic!
Our kids loved this place, we are traveling the country and this is their fave stop so far. A special thank you to Tammy, who was very warm and friendly with our enquiries compared to interactions with other team members. Thank you for making us feel like nothing was a trouble 🙂
This park was a great base for our day trips to Adelaide zoo and to the museum also.
Fantastic. Will be visiting again for a Park a stay, no need to leave once there, awesome food, great kids activities. Love it.
Stay there often when visiting Adelaide. Great location, great amenities.

I have been bringing my three granddaughters here at least once a year for the past 10 years.  We have always had a great experience & even now as teenagers they still love it.  There is so much to do for all ages in all kinds of weather.  We will be back.
This park would be an absolute must for families. If you don’t have kids it is a nice quiet place. Make this your home base as it is so close to other places for you to go sightseeing.
Great meals from the cafe even the possums come for dinner.
Between the water park the gym and games room you really get a lot for your money

Marion Holiday Park was great for us. The staff were really kind and helpful. The facilities were great, and the villa had everything we needed. A bus stop right outside and nearby train station also made things easy, even though we didn't have a car.
Fantastic facilities for families and children,  location is great,  close to the hospital and shopping centre and beautiful gardens. Plenty of activities indoor for when the weather isn't great also

Came in our van. Was like a large oasis. Beautiful and quiet. Facilities are outstanding and everything is kept clean, including the gardens. Will certainly be back again. Ducks are happy here. Come so close, so cute.

While I was initially a bit hesitant about the price for a campsite, it turned out to be more than worth it. The facilities are great, Swimming pool, heated indoor pool, waterpark, playground, good amenities and other activities. Let my kids entertained while I waited for my car to be fixed. All staff were very friendly and helpful as well.
Love this park! Excellent for families with kids and cabins are so lovely! Staff kind! I’ve extended my stay from 4 nights to 5 now! Highly recommended!!
Great place great price

Thr Marion Holiday Park is an all round amazing place to stay! My son absolutely loves the play areas. We missed out on the water play this time as it was too cold but we have used it before and absolutely love it! The accommodation is always beautiful, comfortable and clean and the convenience of having a kitchen is perfect!
I would definitely recommend the Marion Holiday Park to friends and family.

Amazing for families, feels like a resort.  Stayed on a site.   Only disappointed in sites are a little small but for a couple of days stay it’s fine, wouldn’t be able to stay for long periods on a small site.  The place is perfectly clean with modern amenities. Pools are lovely splash park was fun for the kids and the games room with bowling was a lovely touch.  I would stay again.

This would be  one of the best accommodation  we my mother in law have stayed
From the friendly checki in to our being made aware of what was happening in  Park
To our checkout everyone  and accommodation was first class
Will definitely stay again 👍👍

Great holiday park with lots of things to do. Loved the outdoor cinema, jumping pillow, free Netflix, prime ect and the playground. The room was really clean and stylish. Loved the grounds so well kept with all the plants. Only downside was the heated pool didn’t feel warm at all to be honest and the door on the cabin didn’t lock in the inside so my toddlers could easily open the door which they did multiple times we had to put the sofa across the door to sleep haha. A bit pricey but overall a really cool park we will be back in summer.
Heaps to do for all the family. Great water park and pool, loved the cinema/bar area too!

This was the perfect holiday destination with our grandchildren. Our apartment was excellent overlooking the pool, it was clean and well equipped. Staff were friendly and helpful.
All areas were well maintained, lots of fun for the kids going from pools to jumpy castle, playgrounds and indoor area with the bowling alley a hit. We could not fault anything and great cafe with good coffee and other produce available. Well worth the visit and hope to return in the near future.
Great place to stay with all amenities. Very clean and well kept. A home away from home. Will definitely go there again.
Perfect location and holiday with two grandsons aged 7 and 4. So many quality activities to keep them busy all day and into the evening, leading to easy and early bed for us all! Highly recommend.

Great spot for a family getaway! The park has a real holiday vibe with heaps of trees and greenery, which makes it feel peaceful and relaxed. Our kids loved the playgrounds, jumping pillow, and climbing equipment — plus there's loads of space for scooters and bikes. Big win there.

The indoor heated pool, outdoor pool, and small waterpark with a slide were a hit. We didn’t use the public toilets/showers ourselves, but others said they were clean.

We stayed in a cabin — overall good. Bit of wear and tear but nothing unexpected. They use wristbands instead of keys for access to the pool and other areas, which was a cool touch.

There's also an indoor tennis court and a games room (some games cost a few bucks), and the outdoor cinema with bean bags was a nice bonus for the kids. On-site café/bar was handy for snacks and drinks.

Laundry was $5 a wash, which felt a bit pricey, and there were only four clotheslines we could find — not heaps considering the size of the park. Also, seems like they charge for visitors to enter the park, which might catch some people off guard.

Nice BBQ setups with proper dining space, and there's EV charging plus plenty of extra parking out the front.

All up, a great stay for families — we’d definitely come back.

Highly recommended! We've stayed twice, and the kids absolutely love it, the pools, slides, and arcade room are a big hit. It's perfect for young families looking to enjoy a change of scenery without having to leave the city.

Facilities top notch and so well maintained and cleaned.  Staff go above and beyond and our autistic son is loving his first stay here and building more memories as we explore caravaning.  We were pleasantly surprised at the quality and value for money of the food on offer.  We have 8 nights left and our son will make the most of every minute here.  Shout out to the amazing crew who helped us get caravan into a tight spot blown away by how helpful and welcoming they were.  We love the vibe of this amazing venue!!

Best park ever!!!! Amazing facilities, friendly staff, no need to ever leave whilst you’re staying here! Suitable for young kids right up to big kids! HEATED Pools, splash park, play ground, games rooms, gym! THE BEST!!|Outdoor cinema at the cafe so kids can be entertained whilst eating!
Excellent  facility  great for  families
Absolutely love staying here.

Perfect family holiday.  My nine year old compares all other accommodation to this place as the benchmark of the best place to stay with lots to do. If you don't want to leave the holiday park, it's completely possible to keep yourselves entertained without jumping in a car.  Facilities are second to none.

Helpful staff, clean and spacious amenities (1/2 stoves didn’t work, though), level campsites.
So, so noisy. We expected noise from the highway, earplugs took mostly care of that.
What we didn’t realise in advance:
- This place does not have a “quiet before x AM” policy, only a “quiet after 10 PM” policy.
- The playground is situated right in the middle of everything.
- The bouncy castle is deflated each night by 10 pm, but for some ungodly reason it is then reinflated very, very early.
- We would therefore be kept awake by screaming children on the playground from 5:30 AM. Earplugs stood no chance.

So, yes, this is a child-friendly place.

Family of 5, 3 kids under 6 stayed for two nights in a 2 bedroom bungalow. Porta cot and high chair were provided upon request for a small fee, which was very convenient. |Cabin was excellent. Very clean and spacious with a large, modern TV which was handy at wind down time. |The on-site facilities are practically perfect. Brilliant games room, stunning pool, excellent water park, great playground, and a good old faithful jumping pillow. |The Cafe was great for breakfast, and coffee was excellent, albeit a tiny moment of contention from a staff member, but that was Minor in consideration with the entirety of our stay. |The restaurant and big screen movies were a fantastic experience with great value options available.| The staff at the restaurant were incredibly helpful and friendly. |We highly recommend staying here and we will certainly return. |

We are a family of 5 (2 adults 3 kids) visiting Adelaide from Perth. We had a truly memorable, relaxing and very fun stay at Marion HP. Highlights included open air movie night, the on site Cafe, amazing outdoor and indoor (heated) pools, games room with mini bowling alley and full sized basketball/sports courts, and the beautiful comfortable accommodation. It was about 20 mins out of central Adelaide but totally worth it for us - its close to Glenelg which is a great area to explore as a family. Definitely 5 stars.

Our second time being here, great experience again.
Staff are very friendly (one bad experience with a grounds person when we first arrived) We have stayed beside the playground and pool and found both accomodations clean and great for our family of 4. This is our first point of call when we visit from Melbourne.
Had a family holiday here. Absolutely amazing! Highly recommended.

Laatste stop van onze camper-tour in Australië. Een geweldige oase in de stad, een oase van rust, netheid, service, ja precies dat mooie moment om alvast terug te kijken, maar ook om nog even onbezorgd te genieten van de laatste dagen.
Een prima camping/vakantiepark, wat we van harte willen aanbevelen!

What a magnificent hidden gem !
This park was amazing to say the least , nestled in the heart of southern suburbs you find yourself tucked away amongst the beautiful gum trees with wild life plentiful, the sounds of birds chirping , ducks wondering around and the occasional frog its truly a relaxing atmosphere were you quickly forget the hustle and bustle that surrounds you - with a plethora of things to keep the kids amused from the massive swimming pool with adjoining toddlers area that is undercover , a fantastic waterslide /splash park it’s hard to get better value for money than this park - the Entertainment facility is packed with arcade games , a Bowling Alley, 8 ball , Air hockey, table tennis , it even has a full size Tennis court all undercover . Head upstairs and you can get your self a work out in a fully equipped Gym .
We watched a movie at the outdoor cinema on the massive screen and ate Pizza while drinking cocktails made at the outdoor cafe everything was reasonably priced and the service is top class .
Our family stayed in a 3bed bungalow that was well maintained and had all the perks of being at home with a Spa to boot .
Highly recommend you get a few nights stay and make some great memories you will not be disappointed.

Feedback to the Staff (Some of the staff contacted me):

-Treat your workplace like your home and your customers like your family members. This approach will foster a positive and welcoming environment for everyone.

-Always smile, as it not only spreads positivity but also builds trust and rapport with customers.

-Speak slowly and clearly to minimize misunderstandings. Effective communication is key to providing excellent service.

-Show respect to customers by acknowledging their cultural backgrounds. Respect is not just a courtesy, but also a fundamental part of building meaningful relationships.

-Practice self-reflection and critical thinking. These habits will help you improve both your personal standards and the overall quality of your work.
When addressing issues, always think about the best possible way to solve problems with a calm and thoughtful approach.

-Avoid negative expressions like “We are busy,” “Unclear communication,” or “Rude language.” Instead, strive to be clear, polite, and efficient in all your interactions.

Thank you 🙏🏼!

We drove from Melbourne for a family holiday. 2 adults 1 child 1 infant. Great family vacation with great facilities. Playground was excellent with a large jumping pillow. Play ground was suitable for all ages. Swimming pool and splash park was also great. Location is good as well 6 minute drive to Westfield shopping center or just a 20min walk.
Great park, has everything you need. Stayed in an upstairs pool side 2 bedroom which was amazing. Bar/cafe is so good and easy, movie area is amazing. Highly recommend for families. Lots to do!

Honestly can't fault this place !
100% recommend, staff were lovely and everything was clean and neat.
There are SO many things for the kids to do.
We would definitely book again 😁

Great place to stay. They have everything that you could want.
Lovely pool, friendly staff, great location and nice spots. If I could improve one thing it would have been great if the poolbar was open earlier for a fresh cocktail drink next to the pool

What a superb spot for a mini break! We arrived on Friday afternoon and felt like we were on holiday in an oasis. The park is full of shade and we could hear birds singing all day long. We had a poolside villa which was simply magical - it was modern, clean, comfortable and incredibly quiet at night. We could sit out the front of our room and watch the kids play in the massive swimming pool. The staff were efficient and friendly. The waterproof electronic wrist bands were such a great idea. No one got lost or locked out and we didn't need to remember codes or keys when we left the room. We would easily go back for another stay and I would highly recommend Marion Holiday Park to anyone.
A fantastic place to stay
When i tried to check in i was refused i was waiting for a house to settle very rude
A great place for families and children love it. Great bouncing pillow and swimming pools

Amazing holiday park with everything you could possibly need. |We stayed in the Retreat cabin and it was so lovely, spacious and clean. |The pool and bowling was very impressive.|Staff were so helpful and prompt.|Food at the palms was tasty and reasonably priced. |We cant wait to come back again.

This is the second time staying here, and we’ve already booked our third visit for next year. The holiday park is fantastic. It’s full of amenities, spacious, quiet, has so many things onsite for the kids (and adults) to enjoy - and the staff are simply wonderful!
Visiting someone staying there and had lunch at the bar. Delicious 😋

Fabulous holiday park. Super clean, great facilities and lovely staff. I would particularly like to give a shout out to the staff at the snack bar, Louise, Julie and Spyro. Despite being overwhelmingly busy on a weekend night they still gave us fantastic service and food/drinks, they were great with the kids and always had a smile on their faces. Would highly recommend this place to anyone. Many thanks guys!

The staff at the campsite really made this a lovely family trip. We unfortunately had a medical emergency with our son whilst we were here (nothing to do with the park) and the staff, from Julie the first aider, who assessed the situation and advised an ambulance to the staff who ran us back and forth from reception in the buggy to other staff members who called an ambulance, guided them in, stayed with us and looked after us with water, reassurance and care.  I couldn’t fault the attention of all the staff. The park is 5 minutes from the hospital and you don’t think you would need it but it’s very convenient when you do!

My family and I just spent 4 nights in a luxurious poolside apartment. Great way of gathering family together for a few days to catch up. We relaxed by the pool, swam, ate and just enjoyed the vibe. We live locally but once there, its easy to imagine we have travelled to some far away exotic location. We have dubbed it 'Fantasy Island' Exquisite!!!

Great park for families. Accommodation, the cabins, are very impressive: comfotable, modern and well appointed with modern kitchen with complimentary items and good ac and tv. The wrist fobs are a convenient and good idea for the amenities.
The pool, cinema and food are excellent as are the staff. We stayed four nights which wasn't long enough. Very good experience and memories with our grandchildren. We will visit again as soon as.

We have been going to Marion Holiday Park since our granddaughter was 3 years old.
We have a “grandparent’s “ holiday.
She is now 12 , we have just come home from our holiday and she has asked if we can book for 2026 as she just loves it.
We love the pools, all the amenities and the staff cannot do enough for you. The cabins are immaculate and I am a fussy housekeeper!
Everything is there, you do not have to leave the park.
We love the lagoon units the best, we have tried all types of accommodation here.
Wish we could go more often but being pensioners, we save for our precious four days each January.
Well done everyone

Fantastic caravan park that includes everything and more that you could ask for. The pool, waterpark, playground and jumping pillow are well maintained and a great draw card for families with younger kids, our kids loved it. Amenities are clean and easily accessible. The caravan sites are well maintained and spacious. There is also a kiosk near the pool with yummy snacks and drinks available until 9pm. The popular area of Glenelg is around a 5 minute drive away, Westfield Marion is just a couple of blocks and the city is around a 25 minute drive which is also really convenient. Overall a great experience here and wouldn't hesitate to stay again.
Perfect place to stay with kids. I book every January. Kids spend hours in the pool. I go to the gym. Everyone is safe.

The time my family spent at Marion Holiday Park was amazing. It is very nicely arranged for families. The staff was really polite and went above and beyond to assist us. For instance, we had a minor problem with a fishy odour in our refrigerator from the previous guests. After I called reception about it, a kind staff member arrived in a matter of minutes, cleaned everything from top to bottom once more, replenished our towels and water bottle, and brought some activity packs for the kids. Throughout our stay, they also made several check-ins to make sure everything was okay.

Even though we were there during a very busy period, there was always a peaceful place to be found in the main pool, which had a terrific depth. On the cooler days, the tiny heated pool was perfectly warm. The water slides and splash area were well-liked by the children. We also had fun bowling and using the enormous bouncy pillow.

We stayed in a bungalow that was quiet, had all the amenities, and a lovely view with cute little ducks that came to visit. The cafe has delicious coffee, and the kids loved the reasonably priced slushies.

We will definitely be back again soon!
Great holiday resort tucked away in Adelaide. 2 pools plus a water park, and comfortable cabins

Loved the whole park, great family vibes, and my creek front cabin was beautiful with amazing views behind it.
Only annoyance was wifi was pretty much non functional

This place is a close to perfect as you'll get! If you look at the price you might have questions... But the thing is that there's so much to do, you'll cancel all your other plans! That's what my family has done twice! Will always go back there

Hidden little paradise. Perfect for our girls weekend. Great facilities and convenient location. Our cabin had everything we needed. We didn’t want to leave. Staff were super friendly and helpful too. Highly recommend.

Stayed here in January for 5 nights. Kids aged, 10, 10 and 5. It’s a family friendly park and the kids have no shortage of things to keep them occupied from the playground, jumping pillow, 2 pools, water slides, tennis court, pickleball, basketball ring, bowling, cinema etc it is a brilliant family with kids holiday destination. We’re booked to return next year.
Really nice place great for kids bice size pools

A great little caravan park nestled within the city of Adelaide you would not think you were in a city while staying in the caravan park as it feels like a completely separate world.
Outdoor Cinema,indoor pool ,outdoor large pool
2 lane tenpin bowling alley ( kids size but perfectly serviceable for adults as well
)playground for the kids cafe to get your coffees and later on lunch / tea.
A games room however you have to pay for arcade games it would have been nice if it was included within the price of staying in a cabin.
With Marion shopping centre literally 10 minutes up the road it's a great place to stay for a little getaway

Unfortunately the park isn't fully fenced and easily accessed through a creek on the side of the park. It's obviously known to thief's that target the area as we had a bike stolen that was locked to the a-frame of our van, they cut through the lock. This is a known problem to the park as they weren't surprised when reported. Apparently there is an issue with council about getting a fence but nevertheless the safety and security of the guests and belongings should be priority.

We had fun staying here. The place is so relaxing and clean, but we didn't notice that the lamps were exposed.my toddler  touches inside the lamps and got blister , hoperfully its not gonna happen to others. Other than that, it's all good.
Great place to come for a vacation or getaway from ur own place
Excellent facilities, all staff were friendly and helpful. Food was also good value for money.

My family really enjoyed this trip.
Pools were nice, food was AMAZING, and staff were friendly.

5 stars

Highly recommended
We stay hear all the time

Wonderful place to stay with many facilities to use. Something for everyone. Many different accommodation choices that are located around the park. Friendly & helpful staff. Ideally located in an area close to attractions if you choose to venture out of the self contained holiday resort.
Everything about marion holiday park is awesome,  we can't wait to return for our next family holiday
The stay was fantastic and to have Duck 🦆  come to your door in the morning with her baby's was great loved it

First time visiting and we were all very impressed.  Indoor pool really helps in winter but this park will be brilliant in summer with the outdoor pool and water park..... Definitely going back in summer.
Holiday park is good

It's the facilities that make this place great for kids. A large bouncy pillow, 10 pin bowling,  undercover tennis court, great outdoor playground, amusement games, fun water park, large swimming pool, as well as an inside heated pool. Kids' movies are shown 2ce every night out on the lawn or in the heated cabanas. You can order reasonably priced food and drinks from the bar as well.
We stayed in the 2 storey poolside  apartments, which were great for 2 families.  The upstairs unit has a good-sized verandah that overlooks the pool as well as a large table and BBQ on it. The inside kitchen facilities had everything we needed from a microwave, a good-sized fridge, a half size dishwasher oven, a cook top, as well as crockery and cutlery. There was a good size lounge suite, a large wall tv, and another dining table. The upstairs unit has 2 bedrooms  and 2 bathrooms. The large main bedroom (that has a tv)  includes the bath, shower, and toilet all in the same room as a comfortable queen bed. The 2nd room had 2 singles.
The floors are concrete so there is little to no noise between the 2 floors. The concrete floor is a tad cool on the feet in winter. Bedrooms have carpet, though.
We were able to put a child guard up to stop the kids from going down the stairs.
The downstairs unit has only 1 bathroom and felt a tad smaller than the upstairs.  It also had everything you need.
Towels were changed if you put them out.
Overall a great place to stay

We just had a lovely stay in you pool side 2 story apartments, but I have one complaint. The shower in the shared bathroom upstairs has no where to place your toiletries, no soap holder or shelf.  As an older person I am unable to pick a bar of soap of the floor, and found it disgusting to see the top of the rain shower head covered in the previous occupants left over soap and shampoo/ conditioner container's, YUK!

This place is small but well set out. Plenty for the kids to do and the addition of 2x small bowling lanes was great fun.

A part from being on the expensive side I only had a couple of down points.

The shower/toilet block needs a big overhaul. It's looking very tired. A few more towels in the camp kitchen wouldn't go astray either. We've been to quite a few that also provide an airing rack to hang the wet towels.

Whilst watching a movie at night you get two big spot lights shining into your face from behind the screen. Not great when trying to watch a movie.
Nice park. Poor service at the cinema area.
Great service and very professional staff!
The place has lots to do and free too which is nice, but the traffic noise, sirens and helicopters were very disruptive at night.

Our stay here was awesome, super easy to get around the park and local suburbs. The facilities kept all the kids and adults happy while we stayed here for 3 nights. We had a 3 bedroom cabin and it was a great space. Everything was clean and really well kept in the cabin and the park itself. Heaps of space for the kids to ride on bikes and close to the shops too. Lovely park and highly recommend!!
Visiting family.

Been here just under a week andhave a wonderful time.  Found reasonably close to most attractions like beach and wineries, shops and the city. Nicely appointed park very neat,clean. Staff are great and very helpful.

Please be aware if you choose to stay here you must ensure your car/van is locked at all times! We had expensive items stolen from our car. When reporting the incident to reception it was brought to our attention that this is a common occurrence. The park isn’t fully enclosed therefore people outside the park enter via the creek where there is no security or surveillance and steal items outside or within unlocked cars. Unfortunately we must have forgotten to lock our car at some point and was a victim to this lack of security. We have been to many BIG4 caravan parks that are fully enclosed therefore we believe further measures could be taken to ensure the safety of families and reduce the risk of outsiders accessing the park and performing these crimes.

Thieves don’t go on holidays.. not an excuse to have unsatisfactory security at your park. Our car may have been unlocked, we don’t know for sure, but we have read reviews about locked cars being broken into. It’s not the theft that’s the issue,  the issue is the site is easily accessible and there are known criminals, impacting the overall safety of families. This is an expensive park to stay at. Do more! A sign is not a solution. A night walker is not working. Can’t put up a fence? Put up cameras with an alarm at night, something…

This holiday park was amazing, the kids loved it. We will definitely be back again. Only disappointing part was the food in the beer garden, it was awful, and the lady working the bar and kitchen was rude.

Great place to stay and bring the kids. Only downfall was no service to TV, so unable to watch at night whilst relaxing. Parents should tell their children to follow pool rules and more staff to monitor it perhaps. Overall loved it.
Pricey. Won't return.

stayed here with the family, got a great pool, heated pool area (2nd pool) waterslides for kids. only downside, check in a little slow, and the cabin room was okay, overall nice place to stay if you have kids

Staff are super friendly and helpful. Park was amazing and clean. Smaller then I excepted but the facilities were amazing. Water park and the pool was great.
Do suggest no ball games in the pool due to been hit in the eye and my daughter been hit in the neck.
Games room was paid games but still had fun.
Amazing wkend away will definitely come back.

Have stayed here 4 times
3/4 times people have come through in the middle of night and stole everyone stuff that's been left out. Staff show zero empathy and basically just say not our problem.
I have had 2 friends stay and both their stays the same thing happened.
All they have to do is give a warning to people on check in, to bring their stuff in to tents and don't leave things out.

The back end of the place is open with out fences so people walk straight in and straight out with all children's scooters and bikes. The time we stayed we had our fridge, scooters, others ipads, every single bike taken.

The park isn't responsible but can 100% warn people and help these families not have such a horrible experience.

One girl woke up on her birthday to her presents stolen, the park can stop this from happening by simply warning people, even signs up around the park would be an amazing help.
Absolutely beautiful. Highly recommend for families with young kids. We will be back for sure!
Great place for family has lots of stuff for kids & family's  good prices plenty of room for caravans
Was coming as a visitor to see some friends for 10 minutes and they charged me $15. Who does that

Found this place by accident and booked in for 2 nights with our van, 1/2 hr to the city, 5 minutes to major shopping and the amenities, cafe, bar, movie theatre, games arcade and pool were amazing. We tell all our friends to go there for a break. Keeping in mind we actually live in Adelaide.

Hands down the best camp site we stayed at during our trip. Everything is clean and modern and staff is very friendly. Walking distance to the train station. Very similarly priced to other Adelaide caravan parks.

We stayed here the last two nights started off not bad nice little caravan park then started to notice little things like the slides are faded and old the tallest one smells like mold the park swings are outdated and broken our bathroom smelt like awful sewerage and the shower was loud throughout the night the games room has machines from the 70s with lollies that look unsafe for consumption and dirty teddys but then to top it all off this morning we went into front office for a coffee at opening time to be met with a very moody unpleasant woman who was extremely short with us and made us feel unwelcome not sure if its cause we are a female couple but she seemed fine with everyone else and we are a very friendly couple that would do anything and do anything to help others we didnt deserve that sort of treatment , interesting that her attitude changed in front of colleagues when we checked out what a front ! wouldnt recommend and wouldnt return not worth the price or tolerating that attitude, only positive was the lagoon pool and enjoyed the outdoor movie and bar .
Great lagoon apartment accommodation
Best place for caravan. Shopping down the road
Great accommodation for adults and children. Multiple activities to do for the kids, clean and tidy facilities for all kinds of budgets. Highly recommend this for a stay

This is one of the best caravan parks we have stayed in, over  our 20 months on the road!
Everything is fabulous from the incredible pool, beautiful gardens, cafe and movie nights , to the great amenities and wonderful friendly staff at reception! The proximity to the Westfield shopping centre and Glenelg was a bonus too!
Would highly recommend and will always come back here next in Adelaide.

We were visiting interstate and stayed in a Retreat cabin and it was a perfect holiday experience from start to end. The cabin was clean, spacious, and well appointed; the park grounds were well cared for; the facilities were top notch, providing an amazing outdoor pool, an indoor pool, and outdoor cinema; even meal options were terrific at the on-site cafe and bar, and the park is close to public transport options so you needn't drive everywhere. Staff were very friendly and accomodating, making sure we were well taken care of after suffering a couple of flight cancellations delaying our departure. All said and done, if you're visiting Adelaide or surrounds I couldn't recommend any park more than Marion Holiday Park.

We had a poolside apartment. Fantastic  place to catch up with family who live interstate. No need to go to Queensland for the waterparks. It's all there. The amount of Victorian  cars were unbelievable. All the kids loved it and went to the outdoor movie sessions nearly every night. The staff were always more than happy to help with anything needed. The only thing we found was it would have been nice if there were tissues in the apartment.
Awesome spot for a quick staycation with the kids.
Main road is noisy
Superb eden in the middle of suburbs 🌺
